actFast: 298 Hemlock St has both bedrooms of a 2-bed unit posted together for September, exactly the whole-unit match this search has been looking for. Per-room sublets like this get taken within days once found.

333 Lester St and 20 Karen Walk are single-room Sept sublets in the tightest commute radius on the site; several other Bamboo Housing rooms in this batch start in the next few weeks (Aug 22 to Sept 1).
62 Balsam St Unit T113 was listed just 1 day ago, but confirm the reported $1,200 maintenance fee before getting attached to it.
271 Grey Silo Rd was listed 2 days ago and B - 630 Pinerow Cres just 1 day ago. Both are brand new, worth calling immediately despite their tradeoffs.
The Laurelwood 5-bedroom and the Columbia Hills 4-bedroom houses are both tagged NEW on Kijiji. Private-landlord listings like these move fast once the address is shared.
457 Dansbury Dr was listed only 9 days ago and is priced under market for 5 bedrooms. MLS rentals like this typically lease within 2 to 4 weeks.
105 Marshall St is available immediately with a first-month promo, which means the landlord wants it filled now. If the group wants it for September, call soon and negotiate the start date.
536 Glen Forrest Blvd and 561 Mayapple St were listed 37 and 14 days ago respectively. Call to confirm they are still available before counting on them.
scenarioANote: CORRECTED: an earlier version of this note said genuine Scenario A (4-month, Sept-Dec) leases were essentially nonexistent. That was wrong, and the mistake was ours, not the market's. Bamboo Housing (bamboohousing.ca) runs a large, JS-rendered listings board that a plain page fetch could not see; once properly crawled, it turned out to hold 914 active Waterloo listings, 739 of them explicitly "4 Month Sublet." Most of those run May to August (students subletting while away on a summer co-op term, not what this group needs), but a real September-start pocket exists: 24 listings starting between August 22 and September 1, 2026, all ending in December. After screening out stale text, closed listings, and commutes over about 20 minutes, 14 of those are on this site now, tagged Scenario A. As with every Bamboo listing, these are individual per-room subleases, not one lease for the whole group, but several are strong: 298 Hemlock St has both bedrooms of a 2-bed unit posted together, 1 Columbia St W has 3 of 5 rooms posted as one group (with a 4th posted separately at the same address), and 271 Westcourt Pl has 2 of 5 rooms in one townhouse posting. Bamboo Housing has roughly 900 more Waterloo listings beyond the ones curated here; the daily refresh will keep pulling from it, and the group can also browse bamboohousing.ca directly for anything this pass missed. The askAboutShortTerm flag below is left in place for the strongest whole-house Scenario B listings, since a private landlord agreeing to shorten a 12-month lease is still a live option alongside these confirmed per-room Scenario A sublets.

CORRECTED: earlier passes only fetched the marketing homepage, which is a JS-rendered shell with no listings in the raw HTML, and wrongly concluded the site had no usable inventory. A direct fetch of a real listing URL (found via a user tip) revealed the site server-renders full listing data into a Next.js __NEXT_DATA__ JSON block, and the homepage itself paginates through the whole city (31 pages, 914 unique active Waterloo listings as of this crawl). 14 genuine Scenario A per-room sublets and several Scenario B per-room options were added from this source; ~900 more listings exist beyond what was curated here.
Site is JavaScript-only, no data retrievable either pass
